description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that manually triggers a Linux (x86-64) build job. The job checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.13 with pip caching, upgrades pip, installs Qt 6.7.3, installs Python dependencies including PyQt6 and requirements from a file if present, builds extensions with setup.py, and then uses pyinstaller to build an artifact. Finally, upload the artifact from the dist/ directory.
